name: Remote Agent
description: A remote AI assistant running on OpenClaw. Specializes in creative tasks and frontend development.

skills.name: General Conversation
skills.description: Engage in natural conversation and answer questions.

skills.name: Creative Assistant
skills.description: Help with creative tasks including brainstorming, storytelling, and content ideation.
examples: Help me brainstorm a project name

skills.name: Frontend Development
skills.description: Assist with frontend development including React, Next.js, CSS, and UI/UX design.
